title: planera speciosa
intro: Planera speciosa, also known as the American planer or water planer, is a deciduous tree native to the southeastern United States. The bark of Planera speciosa has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Planera speciosa include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as acting as a natural antimicrobial agent. Planera speciosa is often prepared as a salve or tincture, and can also be used in tea form to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
